lib/features/auth/infrastructure/service.purpose: Manages persistent session storage using secure storage

patterns_discovered.session_management: Uses result objects (SessionOperationResult) with status enums for all operations
patterns_discovered.error_handling: Consistent exception handling with custom AuthException and error codes
patterns_discovered.logging: Comprehensive debug logging with token masking for security
patterns_discovered.validation: Multi-layered validation (token presence, expiration, session version)
patterns_discovered.abstraction: Provides clean API wrapping AuthLocalDataSource with additional functionality

gotchas_discovered.token_security: Token masking implemented (_maskToken method) to prevent sensitive data exposure in logs
gotchas_discovered.expiration_handling: Complex expiration logic with timeUntilExpiration calculations
gotchas_discovered.session_versioning: Session version stored for future migration purposes (v1.0)
gotchas_discovered.null_safety: Comprehensive null checking with fallback values for optional tokens
gotchas_discovered.exception_consistency: All methods throw AuthException with specific error codes for different failure scenarios

approach_outcome.approach: Clean architecture with service layer pattern
approach_outcome.architecture: Infrastructure service wrapping local data source
approach_outcome.implementation: Comprehensive service with all required CRUD operations
approach_outcome.testing: Full unit test coverage with mocking

recommendations.error_handling: Consider implementing circuit breaker pattern for storage failures
recommendations.performance: Add caching layer for repeated token access calls
recommendations.migration: Plan for session version migrations when upgrading storage format
recommendations.monitoring: Add metrics for session operations (save/load/validate success rates)
recommendations.security: Consider adding encryption at the application layer for additional security
